message.content:
@startuml
skinparam shadowing false
skinparam backgroundColor white
skinparam packageStyle rectangle
skinparam packageBorderThickness 3
skinparam packageFontSize 28
skinparam packageFontStyle bold

skinparam classBorderColor #333333
skinparam classBackgroundColor #F2F2F2
skinparam classFontSize 28
skinparam classAttributeFontSize 26
skinparam classStereotypeFontSize 22

package "Kodelister" {
  class "Format" as Format <<codelist>> {
    ○ Ukjent format = av/0
    ○ Ren tekst = x-fmt/111
    ○ TIFF versjon 6 = fmt/353
    ○ PDF/A 1a - ISO 19005-1:2005 = fmt/95
    ○ PDF/A 1b - ISO 19005-1:2005 = fmt/354
    ○ XML = fmt/101
    ○ JPEG = fmt/42
    ○ SOSI = av/1
    ○ MPEG-2 = x-fmt/386
    ○ MP3 = fmt/134
    ○ PNG = fmt/11
  }
}
@enduml
